name: New Fortress Energy Inc.

profile.description: New Fortress Energy develops LNG infrastructure including terminals, power plants, and gas supply. In severe financial distress with revenue down 50.8% YoY, profit margin of -164%, and ROE of -222%. Stock at $0.51 with $146M market cap. CEO Wes Edens. Headquartered in New York.

innovation.label: WEAK
innovation.analysis: Track Record (1/3): NFE built LNG terminals in challenging markets (Caribbean, Brazil) — innovative approach to energy infrastructure but execution has been poor. AI Deployment (0/2): No AI. Market Share (1/2): Niche LNG infrastructure player. Product Pipeline (1/2): FLNG assets if completed. R&D Intensity (0/1): Not R&D-intensive.

inspiration.label: WEAK
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (1/4): Energy access mission. Community Impact (1/2): LNG terminals serve energy-poor regions. Employee Retention (0/2): Financial distress. Insider Buying (0/2): No data.

infrastructure.label: AT RISK
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored. Revenue down 50.8%, profit margin -164.2%, ROE -222%. All metrics at floor or below. Financial distress with $146M market cap [1].

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (7/9): LNG infrastructure is physical and AI-immune. AI data center energy demand benefits gas-to-power. AI Opportunity (1/1): Gas-to-power supports AI energy needs.

infinite_game.summary: NFE operates in pure survival mode with existential financial distress.

just_cause.analysis: Just Cause (0/3): Survival mode, no purpose beyond financial rescue.

trusting_teams.analysis: Trusting Teams (0/2): Financial distress erodes trust.

existential_flexibility.analysis: Existential Flexibility (0/2): Stuck in distressed asset base.

courage_to_lead.analysis: Courage to Lead (0/2): Survival decisions, not courageous ones.

investment_thesis: NFE's LNG infrastructure assets could have significant value if the company survives its financial distress. Forward P/E of 7.3 suggests some path to profitability.
thesis_continued: Revenue collapsed 50.8%, profit margin -164%, ROE -222%, and $146M market cap reflect existential risk [1]. Bankruptcy or severe dilution are the most likely outcomes.
key_catalysts: Gas-to-power demand from AI energy needs
key_risks: Existential financial distress with -164% profit margin
Potential bankruptcy or severe shareholder dilution
sources: Yahoo Finance — NFE Key Statistics, accessed June 2026
